description: Turborepo monorepos (detected via turbo.json at repo root).

plugins.description: Third-party plugin (github.com/pleaseai/claude-code-plugins, MIT) - triggers on turbo.json, task pipelines, dependsOn, caching, --filter/--affected, CI optimization. Modest adoption, only dedicated Turborepo plugin found. Free; prefer local/self-hosted caching over its optional paid remote-cache guidance.

_notes: The turborepo@pleaseai plugin above is the only dedicated Turborepo plugin; there is also a first-party Turborepo Agent Skill (npx skills add) if you want it.
